title: Ini Nan Unna En Kanna Pola Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Bae, kannaala thittidathe
Yenna bae
pazhasellam parandhu poye poyache
Bae antha Siripa niruthidathe
Yenna Bae
ini adhu thaan maa en vela-nu aayache

Ini nan unna
en kanna pola parthukka poren
Thunaiya kaatha
andha mazhaiya kooda serthukka poren

Unakku edhellam
pudikkdumunnu therinjikka poren
En bae needhaanu
oorukellam therivikka poren

Anbe en bae neethane
endhan anbe neethane
En bae endraal
ini ellathukkum mela nee thaane

En bae neethaney
endhan thembe neethaane
Munbae munbae vandhaai
anbae neethaney

Bae, kannaala thittidathe
Yenna bae
pazhasellam parandhu poye poyache
Bae antha Siripa niruthidathe
Yenna Bae
ini adhu thaan maa en vela-nu aayache

Ini nan unna
en kanna pola parthukka poren
Thunaiya kaatha
andha mazhaiya kooda serthukka poren

Thalli nee ponaa thaedi varuveney
Thakka samaiyathil kaiya tharuveney
Ohhh un akkam pakkama aalu illaati
Pakkam varalaamey kanne oruvaati

Pudhusaa kaadhala
palagi paakuren, Nalla neram
Edhukku edanjalaaa
mile kanakkula dhooram

Kaadhal chinname
unna paarkanumnu kettadhaal
Inga kondu vandheney
Anbe en bae neethane

endhan anbe neethane

ini ellathukkum mela nee thaane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of being in love, highlighting the connection between partners.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

The song captures a pivotal moment of romance, showcasing the protagonist's feelings towards their beloved.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Aditya R K and composed by Anirudh.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 16, 2022.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ini Nan Unna En Kanna Pola, the protagonist expresses their deep affection and longing for their beloved. The song's romantic theme is beautifully complemented by the soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics. It evokes emotions of love and happiness, making it perfect for special occasions like weddings and anniversaries. The collaboration between Aditya R K and Anirudh adds a unique charm that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ini Nan Unna En Kanna Pola is a captivating romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Aditya R K's soulful vocals and Anirudh's enchanting music, this song promises to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics penned by Vignesh Shivan and let the emotions sweep you away.
stanzaMeanings: Bae, don't scold me. Everything has gone away. Bae, don't stop that smile. Bae, now that is my work.
Now I am going to see you like my eyes. I will also join that rain which is my companion.
I will find out what you like. My bae, I will let everyone know about you.
My love, you are my love. If I say my bae, you are above everything.
My bae, you are my darling. You came before me, my love.
Bae, don't scold me. Everything has gone away. Bae, don't stop that smile. Bae, now that is my work.
Now I am going to see you like my eyes. I will also join that rain which is my companion.
If you leave, I will come searching for you. I will give you my hand at the right time. Ohhh, without looking at your beauty, no one will come close to you.
I am looking at love in a new way, good times. Why is there a distance in calculations?
When I heard that I should see you, I came here. My love, you are my love.
My bae, if I say my bae, you are above everything.
Bae, don't scold me. Everything has gone away. Bae, don't stop that smile. Bae, now that is my work.
Now I am going to see you like my eyes. I will also join that rain which is my companion.
